sentences.text: Benefits, proof, and the 'so what' chain
Two upgrades that separate converting copy from pretty copy:
The 'so what' chain: features are facts; benefits are outcomes.
until you hit the reader's life: 256-bit encryption → so what?
→ your data can't be stolen → so what?
Ask AI to run the chain on your whole feature list
Proof beats promises: every claim needs backup — a number, a testimonial, a demo, a guarantee.
Ask AI: "List every claim in this draft, and tell me which ones lack proof"
